mnemonics.title: Confusion Matrix
mnemonics.content: TP-TopLeft, FP-TopRight, FN-BottomLeft, TN-BottomRight (Like reading a book: Left to Right, Top to Bottom)

mnemonics.title: Precision vs Recall
mnemonics.content: Precision: Quality of positive predictions. Recall: Quantity of positives found

visualTips.visualization: Plot TPR (y-axis) vs FPR (x-axis) across thresholds

analogies.analogy: Like car's fuel efficiency - balances power (recall) and mileage (precision)
Measuring dart throws: Squared distance from bullseye
